calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Apr-10-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jason Louie appeared by zoom for and with Julia Zeuli by zoom.

The court noted that this came out of a quiet title action in Mendocino and that it lies in Mendocino. Mr. Louie stated that they are trying to avoid probate, that it was a typo in the legal property description, provided history of the property and asked that if parcel 55 is not returned to the trust, that it not appear in the decedent's name. The Petition for Order Confirming Trust Assets is under submission. The court informed Mr. Louie that four parcels are no problem, but parcel 55 is an issue.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: D. Nguyen. Not reported.
